# Manish Talreja

> Flutter & Mobile Application Developer based in Indore, India. 5+ years experience, 50+ projects delivered, 20+ live apps in production. Currently a Software Engineer at Zenoti.

## Identity

- Full name: Manish Talreja
- Role: Mobile Application Developer · Flutter
- Location: Indore, India
- Email: manishtalreja0510@gmail.com
- Website: https://personal-portfolio-universe.web.app/
- GitHub: https://github.com/manishtalreja0510
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/manish-talreja/
- pub.dev: https://pub.dev/publishers/manishtalreja.in/packages

## Summary

Manish Talreja is a Flutter and mobile application developer with over 5 years of professional experience building cross-platform apps for Android and iOS. He has delivered 50+ projects and shipped 20+ apps currently live on the Play Store and App Store, spanning telehealth, taxi booking, finance, social media, and dating platforms. He is currently a Software Engineer at Zenoti, engineering the Point-of-Sale module for a global wellness SaaS platform. Previously he spent 4 years at Webwiders as a Mobile Application Developer, and started his career as an intern at Aurd Infotech. He holds a B.Tech in Computer Science from RGPV, Bhopal (2021) and has completed a Flutter Development Bootcamp with Dart certification.

## Skills

- Flutter (4+ years, primary expertise)
- Dart
- Clean Architecture & Provider state management
- Firebase (auth, Firestore, storage, analytics)
- REST APIs (Dio; published open-source package on pub.dev)
- Google Maps & Geolocation
- Payment Gateways & In-App Purchases
- React Native
- SQL, MongoDB
- Git

## Experience

### Software Engineer — Zenoti (Feb 2026 – Present)
Engineering the Point-of-Sale module of Zenoti, a SaaS platform powering salons, spas, and wellness businesses worldwide. Building checkout, billing, and payment flows where reliability and speed are critical.

### Mobile Application Developer — Webwiders (Jan 2022 – Feb 2026)
Delivered 50+ projects and 20+ live apps across telehealth, taxi booking, finance, social media, and dating. Improved app performance by 30% through clean architecture and Provider-based state management. Mentored junior developers.

### Software Developer Intern — Aurd Infotech (Aug 2021 – Dec 2021)
Shipped features across mobile app projects, working with designers and backend teams.

## Projects

### Simplix — On-demand home services marketplace
Flutter app connecting users with vetted professionals for carpentry, locksmithing, cleaning, electrical, and plumbing. Real-time booking and location-based discovery. 18-month build.
- Play Store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.app.simplix
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/simplix-app/id6702024075

### Learn Play Live — Gamified health & wellness tracking
Cross-platform health companion for chronic-condition management (diabetes, hypertension). Medication reminders, vitals monitoring, gamified "Garden of Wellness". Built with Flutter, Firebase, Provider.
- Play Store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.learn_play_live.application
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/learn-play-live-app/id6742144664

### Versus Hot — Truth-or-dare party game
Cross-platform party game with category-based challenges, in-app purchases, and ads. Published on Google Play.
- Play Store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.versushot.truthdareapp

### Kamaleon — Secure vault & file hider
Privacy-first Flutter app hiding sensitive files locally and in the cloud. Decoy content, secure login, cloud sync. 500+ downloads.
- Play Store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.kamaleon.app

## Open-source packages

### custom_styles_package
Reusable, responsive Flutter UI widgets — CustomText, CustomButton, CustomTextField — with global style configuration.
- https://pub.dev/packages/custom_styles_package

### custom_api_services
Dio-powered Flutter networking package with built-in caching, authentication, error handling, and offline support.
- https://pub.dev/packages/custom_api_services

## Education

- B.Tech in Computer Science · RGPV, Bhopal · 2021
- Flutter Development Bootcamp with Dart (certification)

## About

Manish is a Flutter developer who cares about clean architecture, smooth motion, and interfaces that feel effortless. He builds apps people actually use. Outside work he plays cricket and chess.
